title: Sales & Marketing
description:
About Us

Buildo Engineering PTE LTD is a supplier of green and sustainable construction materials, including Autoclaved Aerated Lightweight Concrete (ALC) panels and cork products. We support construction projects by providing quality materials, technical coordination, and responsive customer service.

Job Summary

We are looking for a Sales & Marketing Executive to support our Business Development Manager in sales, marketing, and customer engagement activities. This role is ideal for a motivated individual who enjoys coordination, follow-ups, and building customer relationships in the construction industry.

Key Responsibilities

  • Assist the Business Development Manager in daily sales and marketing activities.

  • Support marketing initiatives, including preparation of sales materials and coordination of marketing activities.

  • Engage customers through emails, calls, and meetings; follow up on enquiries and quotations.

  • Maintain and update customer records, sales pipelines, and documentation.

  • Coordinate with internal teams on pricing, delivery schedules, and technical information.

  • Prepare basic reports, proposals, and administrative documents related to sales activities.

  • Handle general administrative duties related to sales and customer management.

Requirements

  • Diploma in Business, Marketing or related field.

  • 1–3 years of experience in sales support, customer service, or administrative roles (construction industry is an advantage).

  • Good communication and interpersonal skills.

  • Organized, detail-oriented, and able to follow up independently.

  • Proficient in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook).

  • Willingness to learn and grow in business development and sales.

postedCompany.description:
Buildo Engineering is the leading Autoclaved Aerated Lightweight Concrete (ALC) reinforced panel supplier in terms of product quality, design and solution, technical support and services. We actively promote green architecture and advocate low-carbon life. Because of its low density, our product not only features low raw material consumption, but also helps reduce carbon emissions during transportation and installation processes. The superior performance of ALC’s high thermal insulation, fire resistance, water resistance and lightweight, make it a very Green and Sustainable product.

Buildo also promotes Cork-based thermal and acoustic plaster and screed. Cork has excellent thermal insulating properties and is known for its ability to absorb sound vibrations and dampens sound, making it an ideal material for both thermal and acoustic applications. Promoting cork-based thermal and acoustic plaster not only offers practical benefits but also aligns with sustainability goals, as cork is a renewable resource that can be harvested without harming the cork oak trees. It's a great example of innovative and eco-friendly building materials being utilized to enhance both comfort and environmental responsibility.
postedCompany.name: BUILDO ENGINEERING PTE. LTD.
